statusLine.command: bash -c 'plugin_dir=$(ls -d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/claude-hud/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | awk -F/ '"'"'{ print $(NF-1) "\t" $(0) }'"'"' | sort -t. -k1,1n -k2,2n -k3,3n -k4,4n | tail -1 | cut -f2-); exec "/root/.nvm/versions/node/v24.15.0/bin/node" "${plugin_dir}dist/index.js"'
